drawer.title: Connected wallet
drawer.description: Wallet details, voting status, and account actions

delegation.alertDescription: Delegate the voting power of your {balance} {noun} so you can vote through your smart account.
delegation.successToast: Voting power delegated to your smart account

modal.title: Voting Delegation
modal.description: Delegating allows someone else to vote with your NFTs while you retain ownership. This doesn't transfer your tokens.
modal.descriptionNotConnected: Connect your wallet to view and manage your voting delegation.
modal.selfDelegatedNote: You are voting with your own NFTs
modal.delegatedNote: Your votes are delegated to another address
modal.newDelegateHint: Enter the Ethereum address you want to delegate your voting power to
modal.toastInvalidAddressDescription: Please enter a valid Ethereum address
modal.toastNoTokensDescription: You don't own any Gnars NFTs. Delegation requires owning at least one token.
modal.toastAlreadyDelegatedDescription: You are already delegated to this address.

onboarding.title: Vote without paying gas
onboarding.alertDescription: Delegate the voting power of your {noun} to your smart account so you can vote through the new flow. You can always do this later from the wallet menu.
